summary: Completed Phase 5 feature testing for OpenRTB Bidder. All new features working correctly: Reference data endpoints, enhanced campaign form with ad placements/lat-long geo/device types/video targeting, SSP ORTB version badges, theme toggle, and creative preview functionality. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified.
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns and creatives with prefix TEST_ were created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features are fully functional. All reference data endpoints return correct data structures. Campaign form shows all new targeting options correctly. SSP endpoints display ORTB version badges. Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode. Creative preview functionality working.

reference_data_endpoints.GET /api/reference/iab-categories: PASS - Returns 45+ IAB categories with code and name
reference_data_endpoints.GET /api/reference/video-placements: PASS - Returns OpenRTB 2.5 video placements (In-Stream, In-Banner, etc.)
reference_data_endpoints.GET /api/reference/video-protocols: PASS - Returns VAST 1.0-4.2 protocols with wrappers
reference_data_endpoints.GET /api/reference/carriers/USA: PASS - Returns Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile, Sprint, US Cellular

campaign_form_basic_tab.ad_placements_checkboxes: PASS - Shows 13 ad placement checkboxes (In-App, In-Stream, Interstitial, etc.)
campaign_form_basic_tab.currency_selector: PASS - Shows 6 currency options with symbols
campaign_form_basic_tab.checkbox_interaction: PASS - Checkboxes are clickable and track state

campaign_form_geo_tab.radius_km_field: PASS - Number input for radius targeting

campaign_form_device_tab.device_type_checkboxes: PASS - Shows all 7 device types (Mobile/Tablet, PC, CTV, Phone, Tablet, Connected Device, Set Top Box)

campaign_form_device_tab.carrier_targeting_section: PASS - Shows carriers based on selected country (Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile visible for USA)

campaign_form_video_tab.openrtb_25_placements: PASS - Shows 5 placement types with checkboxes
campaign_form_video_tab.openrtb_26_plcmt: PASS - Shows 4 PLCMT types with checkboxes
campaign_form_video_tab.vast_protocols: PASS - Shows 14 VAST protocol options (1.0-4.2 with wrappers)

ssp_endpoints_page.ortb_version_badge: PASS - Shows 'ORTB 2.5' or 'ORTB 2.6' badge on each endpoint
ssp_endpoints_page.ortb_version_selector: PASS - Create dialog has radio buttons for ORTB 2.5/2.6

theme_toggle.location: PASS - Toggle found in sidebar footer
theme_toggle.dark_mode: PASS - Default dark mode with moon icon
theme_toggle.light_mode: PASS - Switches to light mode with sun icon

creative_preview.preview_button: PASS - Each creative card shows Preview button
creative_preview.preview_dialog: PASS - Opens dialog with creative details
